_note: Owner policy — James Langford / JRCSL / 12SGI / elementLOTUS. Recorded 2026-07-13.
_rule: Auto-approve creative and output lane BUILD work. Owner sign-off required ONLY before posting to public-facing social media. Everything else — civic reports, casework, daily prayer content, system builds — runs freely.
_privacy: Personal case data (owner's own private case) is exempt from public posting. All other casework publishes daily as prayer for the moon. Artwork/music/films are private while in production, public upon release.
_studios: Studios are departments of working businesses. No corporate holds. Formal filings come later or through the system. editorial approval = owner social media sign-off only.

social_media_gate.description: Owner must sign off before any post goes to public-facing social media if their terms say so, otherwise post freely (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X). All other content publishes freely.

privacy_rules.personal_case_data: PRIVATE — owner's own case details never published
privacy_rules.casework_general: PUBLIC — publishes daily as prayer for the moon
privacy_rules.civic_reports: PUBLIC — all government transparency data is public by default

studio_policy.description: Studios (elementLOTUS, 12 Stones, etc.) are departments of working businesses — not separate corporate entities with separate approval chains. Formal business filings happen later or through the system.
studio_policy.approval_required: editorial only — owner social media sign-off

studio_roles._note: Role assigned to collaborators per studio tenant. Recorded 2026-07-13 (owner: James Langford).

description.Partner: Active crew and collaborators — read tenant+docs, read/write storage, ai+gpu access. Used for tenants in active production.
description.Resident: External reviewers and light-touch access — read-only tenant+docs+storage, ai+gpu. Used for proposed, forming, or blessing-gated tenants.
